charity.s: Certified B Corporation since 2018 (B Impact score 87.4/200).

environment.s: Certified B Corporation since 2018 (B Impact score 87.4/200). Fair Trade Certified partner (apparel) — sources through cooperatives guaranteeing minimum prices and community premiums.

dei.s: Certified B Corporation since 2018 (B Impact score 87.4/200). HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

animals.s: Via parent company Gap Inc.: Good On You It's a Start — Better Cotton Initiative + worker programs in supply chain. [goodonyou]

privacy.s: Via parent company Gap Inc.: Wikidata records a notable event: Gap Inc. 2007 data breach. (Wikidata Q420822)

health.s: Via parent company Gap Inc.: 11 CPSC recalls (1 in past 24 months); latest hazard: the detachable tissue box toy can come apart.
